title: claytonia obovata
intro: Claytonia obovata, also known as the narrow-leaved miner's lettuce, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Portulacaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as acting as a natural remedy for digestive issues and skin problems. Claytonia obovata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
